summary: First iteration: full backend + frontend testing for GATE Study OS. All 23 pytest backend tests passed (100%). Frontend smoke covered Login, Dashboard (8 stat cards), Subjects, Subject Detail, Question Bank (MCQ submit + inline solution + log mistake), PYQs, Mistakes, Playlists (empty + import dialog), Resources (add dialog), Analytics (Recharts SVGs rendered), Settings (user info + sign-out). All flows passed.

issues: Radix Dialog warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - accessibility (a11y) warning only, not breaking. Recommend adding <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby.

action_items: Optional: Add DialogDescription to Playlists import dialog and Resources add dialog to silence Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 906 lines - consider splitting into modules (auth, questions, pyqs, playlists, analytics, admin, seed) per >700 line guideline.
POST /api/seed is publicly callable (no auth). Should be admin-gated or removed in production - currently safe because it is idempotent, but still exposes data manipulation.
auth_session stores expires_at as ISO string while compare logic does fromisoformat() -> works, but mixing str/datetime is fragile. Prefer storing native datetime in Mongo.
playlist import uses synchronous `requests` library inside async endpoints (blocks event loop). Use httpx.AsyncClient.
Frontend: console shows 401 errors on initial load (AuthContext /auth/me before login) - harmless but noisy; consider treating 401 silently.
test_credentials: Created via mongosh per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Admin token: test_session_1781039250826 (user_id test-user-1781039250826, is_admin=true). Non-admin token: test_session_nonadmin_1781039250913. Tokens valid 7 days.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds at startup. Verified: 10 subjects, 51 topics (from SUBJECTS_SEED), 12 questions, 6 PYQs. Created TEST_ prefixed resource/note/mistake during tests; cleaned up via DELETE endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend running at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. To re-run pytest: ADMIN_TOKEN=<token> USER_TOKEN=<token> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_gate_os_backend.py -v. Create fresh tokens via mongosh script in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. For Playwright, inject cookie session_token on syllabus-hub-28.preview.emergentagent.com domain (httpOnly, secure, sameSite=None). Backend get_current_user accepts both Bearer header and session_token cookie.
